dashboard.label: Splunk Sentinel
dashboard.description: Autonomous SOC Investigation Platform. Real-time view of AI-powered investigations and containment actions.

search.query: index=sentinel_findings earliest=0 sourcetype="sentinel:investigation" | table _time investigation_id classification severity confidence_tier kill_chain_summary | sort -_time | head 10
index=sentinel_findings earliest=0 sourcetype="sentinel:investigation" | stats count by classification | sort -count
index=sentinel_actions earliest=0 | table _time investigation_id action_type target status executed_at | sort -_time | head 20
index=sentinel_findings earliest=0 sourcetype="sentinel:investigation" | timechart span=1d count by classification
